summary: Tested 2 P0 bug fixes: 1) Notification clearing functionality - PASS, 2) Definitions page installations dropdown on desktop - PASS. Both bugs have been fixed and verified via Playwright UI testing and backend API testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 Fix: Layout.js now properly declares dismissedNotifications state with useState - was previously used but never declared
Bug 2 Fix: definitions.py get_installations_with_definitions endpoint now queries ALL installations without created_by filter, matching equipment-hierarchy/installations behavior
Translation keys added for notifications.clearAll, notifications.cleared, notifications.showAgain in English and Dutch

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Both notification clearing and definitions page working correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 bugs are fixed. Notification clearing shows 'Notifications cleared' message with 'Show notifications' link to restore. Definitions page on desktop shows Tyromer installation in dropdown and displays all 4 tabs (Criticality, Severity, Occurrence, Detection) with full definition content after selection.

bug_fix_1_notification_clearing.description: Clear button in notifications dropdown should hide notifications and show 'Notifications cleared' message with 'Show notifications' link
bug_fix_1_notification_clearing.details: Clicking Clear button sets dismissedNotifications state to true, hides notification badge, shows 'Notifications cleared' message, and provides 'Show notifications' link to restore notifications

bug_fix_2_definitions_installations.description: Definitions page should show installations (like Tyromer) in dropdown on desktop
bug_fix_2_definitions_installations.details: Backend API /api/definitions/installations now returns all installations without created_by filter. Frontend shows installation selector with Tyromer option. After selection, all 4 definition tabs (Criticality, Severity, Occurrence, Detection) are displayed with full content.

/api/equipment-hierarchy/installations.note: Confirmed both endpoints return same Tyromer installation

playwright_tests.definition_tabs_visible: PASS (4 tabs: Criticality, Severity, Occurrence, Detection)
playwright_tests.definition_content_displayed: PASS (Critical, High, Medium levels with Safety, Production, Environment, Reputation dimensions)
